transcript.text:
[It Finally Came to South Korea~!!!!]
[Premium Ingredients]
[And a whole truffle?!?!]
[Gordan Ramsay Burger in Korea]
[Eating All the Burgers]
[This alone costs 140,000 Won (~$117 USD)]
[Always spend money on good food]
[Ridiculous amount of food]
[Magical mukbang starting now!]
[Located in Jamsil Lotte World Mall]
Hello everyone
Where I'm at right now...
Is Korea's Gordon Ramsay Burger
It was on the news and everything So I had to come and try it out
They have so many different kinds of burgers
I plan on trying all of them

I want everything here
-All burgers -We're going for it
-Best menu -The best?
We start from the Forest Burger,
Farm Burger,
Veg Burger,
-Prawn Burger -All
1 by 1 or multiple?
-All at once -Holy sh*t, really?!
Very high temperature
Can I get a doctor, please?
Beer, cocktail, or shake?
You gotta shake it
Strawberry pudding?
Because she wants to be the same color
Please take out all pickles and cucumbers!

No pickles?
[Refusal of service]
-See you soon -Thank you
[Longest receipt of orders so far]
[Patties made with Ramsay's recipe]
[Freshly cut vegetables]
[And a whole truffle]
[Premium Burgers ready to be served]
[Ready to go]
[Enjoy!]
[Here they come]
Thank you
This is the 1966 Burger
Thank you
That's a lot of fries
[Let's send this to brother Ramsay]

Enjoy
Wait, which one do I start with?
This guy alone costs 140,000 Won (~$117 USD)
Others cost around 20,000~30,000 Won each (~$17~25 USD)
I've never had such expensive burgers before
Let's try their signature burger first
This is the Hell's Kitchen Burger
I wonder what it tastes like
Oh no! Don't fall
A piece of avocado on top
Avocado,
Jalapeños, tomatoes, and cheese
Bon appetit
Not your everyday burger
That's so flavorful Really tasty
Let's cut it in half again

It's too big
I've never had anything like it Let's start with the patty
It doesn't taste like a burger patty
It's almost like a steak
It has so many ingredients
You can taste different things
It's all falling apart
It's hard to eat because the burger is packed
In 1 bite~!
Is it the cheese? I can taste something really buttery
I have to try this one
Truffle cheese fries
This is popular here Let's dip it in the sauce
The potato fries are...!
That's delicious The potato itself tastes excellent
I love the truffle scent and everything,

But the potato is everything
I'm a french fry fanatic It's really good
Next,
This is their most sold item Forest Burger
Let's eat it as it is
This is really good!
Their patty is really different
The quality is really up there
Wow, this is so tasty
The mushroom sauce? Ragù sauce is really yummy
The bottom bun disappeared
How am I supposed to eat this?
I've never really cut burgers like this before
Sweet potato fries
I expected it to be hard and crunchy
But it's really soft just like potato fries

Very moist, soft, and delicious
Next, we have the chicken burger
Let's cut this in half as well
Cole slaw? It has cole slaw inside
What differentiates this from the others is that...
This has strong herb flavors
And the chicken is tasty
Also feels like I'm eating it with salad because of the cole slaw
Let's try the other bevs now
This is the most popular shake
Brown Butter Shake
What's this?
[Sticky Toffee Pudding Cake]
Yummy
A shake made with a piece of cake
Half shake half bread

Chicken burger
I feel like this won't get soggy even after some time
Protein (Farm Burger) I've been wanting to try it
This is only-meat
This is just what I like Protein Burger
[Protein explosion]
This is only-meat
Fried egg, bacon, patty
[Take a look at that!!]
[She's eating 8 burgers]
[Is this real life?]
It's unbelievable
Glad you're enjoying it
Thank you~!
This really is all meat
So good

I didn't talk much about the buns The buns are really soft
The inside is a little crispy with butter
The other side is squishy
Shrimp, veggie,
This one... wait a min
Are you okay?
This is a vegan burger
The colors are different for sure
How is this not meat? It looks like a meat patty
I wonder if it's good for people like me who hates vegetables
Even the cheese looks a little hollow Different from a regular cheddar cheese
Not bad at all
But I don't want to eat it
I'll eat this at the end
Let's eat something else
I'll leave this here for now

This is the side that comes with the vegan burger
Let's cut it in half
Zucchini
It's okay
I think my body rejects it knowing that it's vegetables no matter how tasty they are
Even Chef Gordan Ramsay can't fix my loathe for vegetables
[Not even like this?]
I'll try the prawn now
Prawn burger with tartar sauce and escabeche
I've never seen anything like it
The flavor is really unique
I think it's the herbs
I'm not too sure Possibly the escabeche
Strawberry
Biscoff flavor
Sugary

I've been fully recharged with sugar
Next, American
I've been wanting to try this also I love American cheese
This looks just like other handcrafted burgers Let's give it a try
American cheese tends to be a little salty
So this tastes like a burger I had in New York
I'm sorry to this burger, but I'm dying to try the next one
I'm very excited for this one
140,000 Won (~$117 USD)
[So shocked]
I'm hungry
[Ain't no way...]
I was told to eat this as a finale because it's that good
So let's finish this one first...
It feels like I'm eating beans
Tastes like beans, but the texture feels like a meat burger

Who will see this and say that it's beans?
Looks just like meat
It's actually not too bad
Not really for me though because I just love meat so much and despise vegetables
It's very nutty, so I feel like it will be a great burger for vegans
And at last...
1966 Burger
With 12-year-aged balsamic vinegar
[Open sesame]
[Packed with 2+ grade beef]
[This is why it was saved for last]
[The visuals...!]
Take a look at this
I've never seen anything like it
That's delicious
Really

You will love this burger if you like eating meat
I can say that it's really fulfilling as a meat lover
The meat itself is excellent I love the scent
It doesn't feel like a burger, more like a steak
That's so good!
This Ragù sauce too
It's excellent
Why's this thing disguising itself as a burger?
The flavors... I can taste the truffle
I personally don't like food with too much truffle oil
But this has an abundant amount of truffle flavors and I'm enjoying it
Really cool
[More drinks] Thank you
How many did I drink?
They took 1 glass, so...
[Counting]

10 cups, if I finish these ones
Let's take it apart
Meat,
Here's the truffle
It's in here as a whole
No wonder it costs so much
I've always had truffle oil, but not the real deal
It's different from the oil
The flavors are not too strong, but it lingers around
A fancy/luxurious taste
Why is it acting like a burger?
It doesn't taste like a burger
[Finishing up rest of the fries]
Impressive..!
-Okay, it's magic -No magic
It's magic

-Thumbs up? -Delicious
Very very delicious
Glad you enjoyed it
Thank you, take care
I just tried everything on the menu
If I had to rank them,
1966 Burger will come in 1st
Forst Burger comes in 2nd
And Hell's Kitchen Burger as 3rd As they say it's their signature burger
Those 3 were outstanding
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
